specs.title: cp-000: The error-state retry button label is exactly Try Again
cp-001: Try Again resets only pageState idle and error null
cp-002: Loading a saved session sets pageState running and progressMessage Loading saved
cp-003: handleLoadSession fetches GET apideep-researchsessionsid
cp-004: The synthetic loaded report always sets summary perspectives contradictions keyF
cp-005: Loading a saved session also sets topic datatopic mode datamode as ResearchMode
cp-006: A saved-session load failure always sets the exact error string Failed to load s
cp-007: ResearchDocument uses react-markdown with remarkGfm
cp-008: extractTOC creates TOC items only from lines starting with or
cp-009: Desktop TOC heading text is exactly Contents
cp-010: Desktop TOC is hidden below the lg breakpoint
cp-011: Mobile TOC is a left-side drawer with width w-72 not a bottom sheet
cp-012: Mobile TOC closes on backdrop click or the X button
cp-013: There is no Escape key handler for the TOC or citations overlays
cp-014: The floating mobile TOC button always renders even when the markdown has no or h
cp-015: The floating mobile citations button renders only when sourceslength 0
cp-016: The floating citations button title is exactly Citations
cp-017: The floating TOC button title is exactly Table of Contents
cp-018: scrollToReference sets highlightedCitation opens the citations panel if it was c
cp-019: handlePanelCitationClick sets highlightedCitation and scrolls the matching Refer
cp-020: Highlighted references keep their blue-tinted background until another citation
cp-021: Markdown links always render target_blank with relnoopener noreferrer
cp-022: Inline code renders only when the markdown code node has no className
cp-023: Code blocks render as bordered code blocks inside pre without syntax highlightin
cp-024: The appended references section title is exactly References
cp-025: Both the references list and citations panel cap rendering at the first 50 sourc
cp-026: Reference author text uses the first 3 authors plus et al when there are more th
cp-027: Reference metadata shows citation counts only when sourcecitationCount 0
cp-028: Reference metadata shows OA only when sourceisOpenAccess is truthy
cp-029: Reference links render individual DOI PubMed and PDF anchors when those fields e
cp-030: When the desktop citations panel is closed the reopen icon button title is exact
cp-031: Inline citation markers render as superscript N text with hover and click behavi
cp-032: expandCitationNumbers supports single numbers comma-separated numbers semicolon-
cp-033: Tooltip position is clamped with Mathminpositiontop windowinnerHeight - 240 and
cp-034: Tooltip link labels are exactly DOI PubMed and PDF
